name: Green Tea Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the milk to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the green tea powder.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg yolks and sugar until they form a ribbon.
4. Gradually combine the egg mixture with the cooled milk, then strain into a saucepan.
5. Cook over medium-high heat until just before the mixture reaches a boil. Remove from heat and let cool completely over ice water.
6. Beat the heavy cream and half & half until frothy.
7. Pour the whipped cream mixture into the cooled egg mixture and mix well.
8. Process in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions.
